log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Air Genasi — Armored Tank's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: IMMUNE to charmed! No effect.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Lich's turn ---
=== ROUND 2 ===

→ Lich: WIS save [d20:10+9=19 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Air Genasi — Armored Tank.
→ Air Genasi — Armored Tank: CON save [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 20] SUCCESS. 11 necrotic damage (half).
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Air Genasi — Armored Tank's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:6+9=15 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Air Genasi — Armored Tank: FAIL! 23 fire damage + .
→ 1/1 targets affected.

=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 5 rounds ===
